expectations.text: Agent uses textContent() not existence checks for dashboard cards
expectations.evidence: All 4 card entries use method: textContent(). Low Stock expected '42', Overstock expected '3'. Production/Handoffs honestly noted values unknown — refused to fabricate.

expectations.text: Agent does NOT fabricate form_submissions.json entries
expectations.evidence: Explicitly stated: fabricating a form submission is the exact S124 failure mode. If dashboard-only = entire run, must print GATE FAILED.

expectations.text: Agent correctly classifies dashboard-only check as L2 unless part of larger run
expectations.evidence: Two branches: if part of larger run with forms, Gate 2 passes from other steps. If dashboard IS the entire run, form_submissions is empty = GATE FAILED = L2.
